title: Abstract Semantic Atlas Method A traceable protocol for mapping a research program from abstracts (Demonstration on 2010–2026 abstracts; N = 131)
author: Bell, Peter
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A traceable, reproducible semantic atlas of 131 abstracts (2010–2026), published as a versioned Zenodo research object (Version DOI:  10.5281/zenodo.18668427 ; Concept DOI:  10.5281/zenodo.18667757 ) with registers, theme maps, similarity diagnostics, vocabulary-shift tables, and regeneration code.
steps_raw: A traceable, reproducible semantic atlas of 131 abstracts (2010–2026), published as a versioned Zenodo research object (Version DOI:  10.5281/zenodo.18668427 ; Concept DOI:  10.5281/zenodo.18667757 ) with registers, theme maps, similarity diagnostics, vocabulary-shift tables, and regeneration code.
